get.description: List all users. Requires users:read permission.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users Get

post.description: Create a new user (staff). Requires users:create permission.

patch.description: Update user (status, full_name, branch). Requires users:update.

get.description: List roles assigned to a user. Requires users:read.

schema.title: Response Get User Roles Api V1 Users  User Id  Roles Get

post.description: Assign a role to a user (optional branch). Requires users:update.

schema.title: Response Add User Role Api V1 Users  User Id  Roles Post

delete.description: Remove a role assignment (same keys as assign). Requires users:update.

post.description: Start password reset for another user (same effect as /auth/password-reset/request).

schema.title: Response Password Reset Confirm Api V1 Auth Password Reset Confirm Post

patch.description: Update current user profile (full_name, phone, preferred_language).

get.description:
Return the current user's effective permissions (roles ∪ overrides).

Mirrors `get_current_user_permissions` from `app/api/deps.py`: each item is
a `(resource, action)` tuple already resolved with role membership and
per-user allow/deny overrides. Used by the frontend `<Can />` guard and
RBAC-driven sidebar trimming (`WEB_FRONTEND_PLAN.md` §4.3, §4.4).

schema.title: Response Me Permissions Api V1 Auth Me Permissions Get

get.description: List audit log entries with optional filters. Requires audit_log:read.
List all config entries. Requires config:read.

schema.title: Response List Config Api V1 Config Get

get.description: Get one config by key. Requires config:read.
List branches (active only unless include_archived). Requires branches:read.

schema.title: Response List Branches Api V1 Branches Get

delete.description:
Soft-delete (archive) a branch. Idempotent. Requires branches:delete.

Archived rows keep their ``code`` so duplicate-code checks still apply until renamed.

get.description: List terminals, optionally by branch. Requires terminals:read.

schema.title: Response List Terminals Api V1 Terminals Get

post.description: Register a new terminal; returns API key once. Requires terminals:create.

patch.description: Update terminal name and/or branch. Requires terminals:update.
Set terminal as authorized to process transactions. Requires terminals:authorize.

post.description: Create a custom role. Requires roles:create.

put.description: Set permissions for a role. Requires roles:update.

AIAutoDiscountRequest.title: AIAutoDiscountRequest
AIAutoDiscountRequest.description:
Strictly validated payload for AI-suggested discount creation.

Creates a Draft DiscountRule for Sales Manager approval.

message.default: Draft discount rule created for approval
